display.name: Woundvine Altar
display.short_description: An altar stone has disappeared under woundvine roots. Clear sap runs down the carvings and gathers in a cup of cracked bone.

choices.label: Bind with clean sap
choices.summary: Use the clear resin like a bandage and seal what the road has opened.

choices.label: Bottle the bitter resin
choices.summary: Take the harsher sap instead and trust the lesson to pay off later.
